title: FAQ Block

fields.label: Label
fields.name: faq_heading
fields.instructions: Short eyebrow label shown above the panel. Defaults to "FAQs".

fields.label: FAQ Items
fields.name: faq_items
fields.instructions: Add one item per question. Each item expands to show its answer.

sub_fields.label: Question
sub_fields.name: question
sub_fields.instructions: The question shown in the accordion trigger.
sub_fields.placeholder: A question about the space I have is...

sub_fields.label: Answer
sub_fields.name: answer
sub_fields.instructions: The answer shown when the item is expanded.

sub_fields.label: Secondary Button Link
sub_fields.name: answer_link
sub_fields.instructions: Optional button link shown below the answer.

description: Accordion-style FAQ panel with an optional eyebrow label and repeater of question/answer items.
